are you?
Good.

Yeah.

and I think it's just easier to hop on a call, you know?
Yeah, yeah.
So, yeah, a bit of churn on our end.
know, Mara was originally supposed to take over, then she left growthx, so basically I'm back, so for better or worse.
It was preemptive, the...

works at WonderUp.

I mean, I think that would be ideal.

Yeah.
Yeah.
So we were.
Thinking of sending you a draft early next week with the aim to send it out next week?
also hoping by, let me actually text him.

So there's just kind of like a few things I'm trying to get for you guys as well.

Yeah, so there should have been an email and then you add it, but we added team at GrowthX.
I mean, I can add individual ones, but we did add a team.
Usually there's an email and it's like, you've been shared this calendar, do you want to add?
Yeah, I didn't see it yesterday.
That was the shoe.
Will it come from you or another Datagrid address?
I think Rai was the one who sent it, but I'll take a look.
Here we go.
Hi.
Hello.
Wow.
It's so sunny there.
Yeah.
Sunny, hot, and humid.
Summer.
Summer in Buenos Aires for you.
Nice to meet you, Vivek, by the way.
Nice to meet you as well, Franco.
Yeah, I kind of, I messaged Tiago and Tiago was like, okay, it's best to get on a call and deal with all this.
I had sent a document over.
I don't know if you had a chance to look at it.
I did.
Yeah.
So there's, we saw those issues on a technical audit.
Not all of them are super, you know, critical.
Some of them are recommendations.
foundation.

But what prompted it was basically we saw a spike in non-index pages, and during the migration, the new website seems to have a lot of URLs with like a weird suffix, and they seem to be clones of existing Datagrid block pages.
And some of those suffix pages don't have original pages, so don't know what's happening there.
But, yeah, so I just wanted to flag that for you.

And also, a second issue was there seems to be a tagging problem with the new pages, because in GA4, we're not seeing any sessions being recorded for, well, quite a lot of the pages that we've created, because the traffic's just absolutely greater, whereas GSC, which doesn't depend on the tag, is showing regular numbers.
So I just wanted to bring that up, and, yeah, flag it to you.
Yeah, so I already kind of...
I've tried to improve and solve a lot of those issues.
Like a couple of days ago when Kaitlin sent me the doc, I went over all of the pages, added the missing canonical tags, removed a couple of noindex tags.
And then I also went ahead and unpublished the previous project and removed any traces of GTAG in there of the search console.
And then also the canonical tags, just in case.
mean, unpublishing would have been enough, but I kind of deleted all traces of that.
And then I also added the JSON schema to the blog posts, not yet to the webinars and events.
I mean, there are a lot of pages that existed in the previous project, that don't exist in the new one yet because we're working on those new designs.
But beyond that, I don't think
I'm not sure what else I can do or my team can do on a technical SEO level inside of Webflow to mitigate this.
It seems like also some of it might be coming from like the Google Analytics panel configuration, which we have limited knowledge of.
Since mainly we're more of a dev and design firm, but yeah, I mean, obviously happy to support anything that we can and know about.
I don't know if what we worked on or what I worked on is sufficient enough to start seeing some improvements and how long those changes take to be indexed.
So in that talk, could you then, I'm just trying to get an idea of what, what WonderUp can and can't handle so that, you know, there's a section there that says.
So...
Summary of actions we recommend taking.
Yes.
Could you just put a simple highlight color saying, we can't do this, or we can do this, or whatever.
I'll leave it up to you.
Yeah, so this I already did.
Because the thing is, from our end, we can't do this because we're not a design agency.
I just want to get an idea and then we can recommend.
I mean, I already did this, too.
Also, I guess some of the keywords probably do.
I just kind of copied what was in the previous pages.
But, you know, since we don't own Datagrid or anything, probably Kaitlin or Tiago are best to recommend the actual descriptions and keywords.
But yeah, we already did this one.
I'm just going to market the ones that we either didn't do or can't do.
Yeah, that would be great.
If you could just highlight it or something, and then I'd take a look at it and talk to our tech.
this one, I'm just going to market orange.
The reason being is we can do it, but the reason I didn't...
screen?
Sorry.
The...
I think it's just...
So the reason I haven't done this one is because those blog posts existed before.
I'm not sure which one's supposed to be...
The duplicates were already up at the previous project.
I'm not sure which ones are supposed to be the ones that need to be up.
We could actually show...
Yeah, just have to choose, they need to choose one, but if I search, yeah, so these are probably, what do need to choose?

Let's see, let me, so for example, I think these are the ones that are duplicated, like if I, yeah, they're the ones with the little suffix at the end, the weird suffix of the, so exactly, this one doesn't have it, whereas this one does, it seems that the content is the same, I think, it's the same, yeah, that's what we saw, so if it's the same, I could just delete all of them, I could literally just like, do that, I think you can delete everything with the suffix, with that weird suffix.
Okay, if, if, if, if,
If you guys allow it.
I'm just going to make sure that I'm looking at it the right way.
But yeah, all of these have a suffix.
So I'm going go ahead.
I mean, first of all.
Some of them have like a one as well, like one, two, EF, whatever.
think the main blog directory also has.
Okay, we're just going to do, we're just going to search by all the numbers.
Yeah, pretty much.
Do you know they start with zero?
No.
Oh, yes.
Yeah.
All right.
So I'm wondering, I think deleted them just to publish this directly.
So minus one.
Is it, I mean, it's still saving a backup just in case that the contents weren't exactly the same.
But in the case.
I to make sure, is this filtering for the suffix at the end, or is it like, okay, it's not at the end.
Yeah, in case there's a number in the first URL, like we have some blogs about Primavera P6 and stuff.

yeah, but you can see that I added the slot here, and I can double check, like all of them have, like even this one, if I go, yeah, like it does, it has that one, and the reason that it's doing that is because I'm adding the suffix, the end dash.
Yeah, and then you see it on the right side.
Yeah, so I'm just going to take these two.
I think maybe you can do this async, I just want to make sure that the list is updated.
Yeah.
Maybe you can do this and then send it to me, and that would be great.
Yeah.
Yeah.
So this is TBD.
I just wanted to check that.
So this I already did.
The only ones that we have a search, the only template that we have online is the blog.
And we highlight the ones that are done in green and then ones that aren't in yellow, just so then we know.
I mean, yeah, so this one is done-ish because you have to check the title, the description.
added the canonicals and checked the H1s, but this is...
If you want to tag me, or is that you, Vivek?
Are you double-checking yours?
Oh, I can...
If it was copied from the old URLs, it should be fine.
I don't think we had any issues with that.
We can certainly check a few samples.
Yeah.
Let me just make sure everything's fine.
Um...
This is, so we need to, we need to change the categories, what's on this one.
But I thought we already did that.
No, yeah, so you don't, it's not, we don't have any category pages.
You just need to go in and like, just make sure that, you know, you, you have the right SEO title tag and meta description, and that's it.
You go to page settings, and then.
No, on the, the one, the category one you just tagged in?
Yeah, but we don't have category, on this new project, don't have any category page.
Got it.
Because we're not using SEO categories, we're real-time search, so.
so.
so, so, so,
We don't need those.
don't have block category pages or any, I mean, this, I just already kind of did.
This shouldn't be happening.
Let me double check that.
Sorry, I do have to hop on another call.
Is there any, so Kaitlin, just so you know, like, we can always rerun the audit to make sure that the action We're done.
So, for example, checking the metadata, et cetera, we can do that once WonderUp finishes everything.
Okay.
And then we can follow up on this.
And meanwhile, Franco, if you have any issues or whatever, just, you know, feel free to tag me.
I'm not in the Slack channel with you guys, but, you know, I'm sure.
Yeah, I mean, I already, I think I already did all of these pretty much, except these two that are more like for the DataGrid team.
So I'll let you know if I've run into anything I haven't done yet.
that.
Okay.
Yeah, and then if we can rerun the audit.
Yep.
Once I get this list, I'll ask our, it's basically Mika, I'll ask Mika to run the thing again, just to verify.

I'll just check with Kyle and see what we can do about that and take next steps.
Okay.
All right.
Cool.
Well, Kaitlin, I'll talk to you later during our sync.
Yeah.

Thank you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on website SEO issues and define a fix plan.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical SEO Issues:** The new site has two major problems: duplicate pages with URL suffixes (e.g., `-1`, `-ef`) causing non-indexable content, and a GA4 tagging failure that prevents session tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Immediate Fixes:** Franco (WonderUp) has already implemented several fixes, including adding missing canonical tags, removing old `noindex` tags, and adding JSON schema to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Clear Ownership:** Franco will use Vivek's audit doc to highlight which tasks WonderUp can and cannot handle. Vivek will then investigate the GA4 tagging failure and coordinate a follow-up audit.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Newsletter Plan:** The next newsletter draft is due early next week for a mid-month send, covering recent updates and upcoming events like the next "agent-a-thon."](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

## Topics

### Website SEO Audit Findings

  - [Vivek (growthx.ai) presented findings from a technical SEO audit, prompted by a spike in non-indexed pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Problem 1: Duplicate Pages**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [The new site has many duplicate blog posts with URL suffixes (e.g., `-1`, `-ef`).](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Some of these suffix pages exist without an original, causing confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Problem 2: GA4 Tagging Failure**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [GA4 is not recording sessions for many new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Google Search Console (GSC), which is tag-independent, shows normal traffic, confirming the issue is with GA4 implementation, not traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### SEO Fix Plan & Ownership

  - [Franco (WonderUp) outlined the fixes already implemented:](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Added missing canonical tags.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Removed old `noindex` tags.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Unpublished the previous project and removed its GTAG/GSC traces.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Added JSON schema to blog posts (pending for webinars/events).](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Franco (WonderUp):**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [Use Vivek's audit doc to highlight tasks WonderUp can/cannot handle.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [Delete duplicate blog posts with URL suffixes.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Vivek (growthx.ai):**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
          - [Investigate the GA4 tagging failure with Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
          - [Request a follow-up audit from Mika after WonderUp's fixes are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Newsletter & Event Sync

  - [**Newsletter:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Goal: Mid-month send covering recent updates and upcoming events.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Vivek will send a draft early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**Events:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Kaitlin will add the next "agent-a-thon" (next month) to the event calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Kaitlin is sourcing a video reel from the last "agent-a-thon" for the newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Calendar Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Vivek confirmed he now has access to the shared calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Franco:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Update the audit doc to clarify WonderUp's scope.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Delete duplicate blog posts with URL suffixes.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Investigate the GA4 tagging failure with Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Request a follow-up SEO audit from Mika once WonderUp's fixes are live.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Send the newsletter draft to Kaitlin early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Add the next "agent-a-thon" to the event calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Source the video reel from the last "agent-a-thon."](https://fathom.video/share/8Wmmubx2Xkq8RsTNLzfrNdg5FJbPWX16?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

action_items.description: Send newsletter draft to Kaitlin next week
Add next month's Agent-a-thon to event calendar
Check GrowthX access to Datagrid event calendar; resend invite if needed
Update audit doc w/ color-coded actions; send to Vivek; then Vivek ask Mika rerun audit
Delete duplicate blog posts w/ numeric suffixes; send updated list to Vivek
Check GA4 tagging w/ Kyle; propose next steps
